reason: The tiny project intentionally has a working npm test command, but lacks broader validation surfaces.

evidence.summary: A project-owned npm test command exists.
A minimal test verifies the runtime marker.

deductions.reason: Only npm test exists; lint, typecheck, build, smoke, and E2E command surfaces are absent.

evidence.summary: Only start and test scripts are defined.

recommendation.summary: Add lint/build/smoke/E2E command surfaces as the project matures.
